memoryAudit.method: same-session baseline heap usage -> 3 scroll/nav/wait cycles -> forced Runtime.gc/HeapProfiler.collectGarbage after each cycle -> final heap snapshot summary

principles.summary: User preference probes including reduced-motion did not raise a finding.
Pending active keyboard/focus/input-modality test; screenshot/DOM evidence is not treated as a pass.
Pending active wayfinding/search/menu-flow test; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.

findings.title: Substantial page chrome/network noise
findings.evidence: HAR recorded 217 requests; script hosts include www.roblox.com, js.rbxcdn.com, roblox.com, apis.roblox.com, client.px-cloud.net.

principles.summary: Mobile layout showed no horizontal overflow.
Primary homepage entry point rendered; task completion flow not exercised.
CLS above good threshold (0.56); LCP above good threshold (20.2s); Total blocking time is high (406ms)

findings.title: LCP above good threshold (20.2s)
findings.suggestedFix: Improve LCP by prioritizing the hero/content resource, reducing render-blocking work, and optimizing server/critical CSS delivery.

findings.title: Total blocking time is high (406ms)
findings.suggestedFix: Reduce main-thread JavaScript by splitting, deferring, and removing non-critical third-party work.

findings.title: CLS above good threshold (0.56)
findings.suggestedFix: Reserve space for late-loading media/ads and avoid inserting content above existing content after render.

findings.title: Lighthouse best-practices score 77
findings.suggestedFix: Review Lighthouse best-practices failures and fix console errors, deprecated APIs, unsafe patterns, and browser compatibility issues.

principles.summary: No app-like offline/installable intent established in homepage batch evidence.
html lang='en'; deeper locale flows not tested.
Pending active consent/account/commerce-flow review for dark patterns; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.
Heavy transfer on initial load (4.6 MB)

findings.title: Heavy transfer on initial load (4.6 MB)
findings.evidence: HAR recorded 217 requests and 4627227 transferred bytes.

principles.summary: Same-session memory pass retained 0.0 MB after interaction cycles and forced GC; no monotonic leak signal above threshold.

verdict: Homepage batch: 7 principles with issues; top concerns: high be-fast-and-stable: CLS above good threshold (0.56); high be-discoverable: Low non-JS discoverability (1%); medium be-sustainable: Heavy transfer on initial load (4.6 MB).
_caveats: Scale batch: no Lighthouse, LCP or INP in this pass; coordinator CDP data should fill objective metrics.
Memory is a single heap snapshot, not a repeated-interaction leak proof.
Dark-mode/reduced-motion are inferred from probes unless separately captured.
Axe blocked or failed: Failed to fetch (unpkg.com)
Memory principle pending rigorous same-session recheck; no pass/issue asserted from single/coarse heap snapshots.
Passive-only principles patched: trustworthy/resilient/natural-interactions/guided-navigation require active flow testing and are not counted as passes.

Lighthouse/trace/reduced-motion video were not collected in the original batch; future batches include them and this site needs supplemental evidence for high-confidence performance/reduced-motion claims.
Supplemental Lighthouse/trace/reduced-motion evidence collected and merged.
Memory was rechecked with same-session baseline, 3 interaction cycles, forced GC, and final heap snapshot; still a homepage smoke test, not full memlab trace attribution.
